scripts.purge: pnpm run purge:containers && pnpm run purge:volumes && pnpm run purge:images && pnpm run purge:prune
scripts.purge:containers: docker ps -a --format '{{.ID}}' | grep -v 'supabase' | xargs -r docker rm
scripts.purge:images: docker images | grep 'supabase' | awk '{print $3}' | xargs -r docker rmi --force
scripts.purge:volumes: docker volume ls --format '{{.Name}}' --filter label=com.supabase.cli.project=auto-job-apps | xargs -r docker volume rm
